title: WORK WITH US - Space Development Agency
text:
SDA is looking to collaborate as we deliver the Proliferated Warfighter Space Architecture (PWSA). With this in mind, SDA is seeking industry partners and others in the community who are looking to make technical strides quickly in the interest of national security. SDA is offering several competition opportunities requesting information and proposals from potential partner organizations. We'd also like to hear from those interested in SDA careers in technical or administrative support areas. Together, we will deliver capabilities to the joint warfighter through the PWSA.
If you want to contribute in this fast-paced, threat-driven environment, we want to hear from you!
